description: Domain archetypes for the Decantation Process. Each archetype pre-maps page patterns, tannins, skeleton layouts, and suggested visual identity for a domain. Archetypes may use "extends" to inherit pages, tannins, and skeletons from a parent archetype. Child pages override parent pages by id; tannins are concatenated and deduped; skeletons are shallow-merged. Circular inheritance and depth > 5 are rejected.

ecommerce.name: E-Commerce
ecommerce.description: Online retail — product catalog, cart, checkout, account management

saas-dashboard.name: SaaS Dashboard
saas-dashboard.description: Analytics/admin dashboard — KPIs, data tables, charts, settings

portfolio.description: Personal or agency showcase — projects, about, contact, blog

content-site.name: Content Site
content-site.description: Blog, magazine, or documentation — articles, categories, search

docs-explorer.name: Docs Explorer
docs-explorer.description: Interactive API and design-system documentation — layered navigation, registry-driven content, search, live theming

financial-dashboard.name: Financial Dashboard
financial-dashboard.description: Performance dashboard for financial services, lending, and banking — portfolio overview, pipeline, collections, compliance

recipe-community.name: Recipe Community
recipe-community.description: AI-powered recipe sharing platform — recipes, cookbooks, photo-to-recipe AI, chef chat, community feed

gaming-platform.name: Gaming Platform
gaming-platform.description: Guild-based gaming community — leaderboards, game catalog, news, member profiles, achievements

ecommerce-admin.name: eCommerce Admin
